data.name: 我獨自搾精~35歲魔術師的搾精之旅
data.detailed_description:
故事

瑪麗安娜，一位已經當了20年賞金獵人的魔術師。

是個接到任務使命必達的狠角色。

自尊心高且不愛與人交流的她，總是獨自一人完成任務。

然而，在某次任務中，她中了一個強大的詛咒。

為了解除這個詛咒，她被告知必須在有限的時間內攝取大量精液，不論對方是什麼種族。

遊戲特色

  • 根據時間的流逝，白天和夜晚的事件也會發生變化！

  • 這是一款冷酷熟女強迫榨精的戰鬥奇幻短篇RPG。

  • 當淫慾值上升時，可觸發的H事件會增加

  • 可透過選單即時確認色情狀態

  • H事件回想房間

  • 有2種結局，可處女通關

  • 剖面圖可以ON、OFF切換

角色介紹

魔法師：瑪麗安娜（35歲）

CV:綾奈まりあ 様

擁有擔任賞金獵人20年的經歷。

接受的任務必定能圓滿完成，是一位技術高超的佼佼者。

個性孤僻，自尊心極高，一直以來都是獨自完成所有任務。

在某項任務中，她中了一個強大的咒語。

為了解除咒語，必須在規定的時間內攝取大量且不同種族的精液…

接待員：羅莎莉（37歲）

CV:ありがた～い私 様

在主角常去的公會工作了20年，

是主角如同同屆生的存在。

個性善良貼心。

她在騎士團工作的丈夫很忙，似乎很少可以見到面。

data.short_description: 因為詛咒，原本冷酷的熟女賞金獵人必須收集男人的精液？！ 為了解開詛咒必須壓低身段去尋求男性們的協助， 看著自尊心超高的熟女賞金獵人不情願地逐漸沐浴在大量的精液之中！！
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Solo leeching~35-Year-Old Magician Journey
data.detailed_description:
[Game Story]

Mariana , a magician who has been a bounty hunter for 20 years.

A highly skilled individual who always completes the quests she takes on.

Dislikes people and has a high pride; she has always worked alone.

However, during a certain mission, she is hit by a powerful curse.

To break the curse, she is told that she must ingest a large amount of semen from various species within a limited time.

[Features]

  • Events change according to the passage of time, both during the day and at night!

  • This is a fantasy short battles RPG featuring a cold mature woman forced into leeching .

  • When the erotic increased, more sex events will happen.

  • You can check erotic state on the menu immediately.

  • Two endings, including a virgin ending

  • Toggle for on/off of sectional views.

[Characters]

Magician：Mariana (35 years old)　
CV:綾奈まりあ

She has been a bounty hunter for 20 years.

A highly skilled individual who always completes the quests she takes on.

Dislikes people and has a high pride; she has always worked alone.

During a certain mission, she is hit by a powerful curse.

To break the curse, she is told that she must ingest a large amount of semen from various species within a limited time.

Receptionist: Rosalie (37 years old)
CV:ありがた～い私

Works at the guild where the protagonist frequents.

She has been working there for 20 years and is like a colleague to the main character.

She is a warm and caring person.

Her husband, who works in the knight order, is busy,

and they don't get to see each other often. (Sex events: 2)

data.short_description: A MILF, who is a potent and cold-blooded bounty hunter, is now hunting for semen because of a curse?! To lift the curse, she has to swallow her pride to ask men for help. Watch the arrogant MILF gradually submit herself to the rain of semen!!
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
